summary: Visual cleanup testing PASSED. All 8 test cases verified: Timeline conversation bubbles (YOU, COACH, AI) have white (#ffffff) backgrounds, center milestone events have white backgrounds, Gmail nudge banner has white bg with #e7dfd4 border, sidebar cards maintain consistent neutral styling (18px radius, #e7dfd4 border, white bg), green status indicators (Stable badge) still use green (#22c55e), YOU label uses teal (#0d9488), floating action bar works (Email, Call, Log, Follow-up), no console errors, Pipeline page has no regression.
critical_code_review_comments: ConversationBubble.js Line 140: All bubbles now correctly use background: '#ffffff' with border: '#e7dfd4' - no green/teal tints
ConversationBubble.js Lines 91-93: Center milestones correctly use white bg with subtle colored borders only (not tinted backgrounds)
JourneyPage.js Line 823: Gmail nudge banner correctly uses white bg (#fff) with #e7dfd4 border
Green color (#22c55e / rgb(34, 197, 94)) correctly preserved for Stable badge status indicator
Teal color (#0d9488 / rgb(13, 148, 136)) correctly preserved for YOU label text in conversation bubbles
All sidebar cards (coaching-stability-card, key-contacts-card, communication-activity-card) use consistent 18px border-radius and #e7dfd4 border
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visual cleanup complete. All timeline card backgrounds changed from green/teal tints to white (#ffffff). Green accent preserved only for small status indicators (Stable badge, checkmarks). Gmail nudge banner now white with #e7dfd4 border. Timeline feels clean and inbox-like.
